commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: Christ healeth the withered hand, 10 and many other infirmities: 11rebuketh the unclean spirits: 13chooseth his twelve apostles: 22convinceth the blasphemy of casting out devils by Beelzebub: 31and sheweth who are his brother, sister, and mother.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: He entered again into the synagogue, viz., of Capharnaum. The man was there either, of course, on account of the sabbath, or to be cured by Jesus Christ.

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content: And healed him that had the withered hand,

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
